notes: v234 — Loads from YOUR SAVED DATA first: after a live price load, volume averages, streaks and signals now come straight from the data on your device (instant, no internet) instead of rebuilding the market's history day-by-day online. The day-by-day build now only runs when you have nothing saved, says so honestly, and has a ■ stop link (progress is kept). Paper trading: new ➕ add cash link for topping up your practice balance properly, and the balance warning no longer false-alarms when you've recorded dividends or paid brokerage fees. Setup & data panel rewritten so it's clear what loads from the internet vs from this device, with a line showing how many shares you have saved and when.
